ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There is a beta update available for the Ribbon Divider plugin. Please update to to the latest version to get the latest features!
ast.target: Ribbon Divider 插件有可用的测试版更新。请更新到最新版本以获取最新功能！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There is an update available for the Ribbon Divider plugin. Please update to to the latest version to get the latest features!
ast.target: Ribbon Divider 插件有可用更新。请更新到最新版本以获取最新功能！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use this settings screen to add/update dividers to your ribbon. Clicking "New Divider" below will immediately add the divider.
ast.target: 使用此设置界面为你的功能区添加/更新分隔线。点击下方“新建分隔线”将立即添加该分隔线。
